'''âr-n-l-zh''' ('''karanlezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:codeswitch|codeswitch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-n-l-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:codeswitch|codeswitch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-n-l-zh
|-
! Lemma
| karanlezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiranlezhoko|thiranlezhoko]] || [[word:jiranlezhoko|jiranlezhoko]] || [[word:shiranlezhoko|shiranlezhoko]] || [[word:kiranlezhoko|kiranlezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
